name: AI Agent Gotchas
description: AI coding agents fail in consistent, predictable ways. They fabricate npm packages that don't exist. They catch errors and continue silently. They add features you never asked for. They lose context mid-session and forget what they were doing.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Armadilhas de Agentes IA
pt-BR.description: Agentes de code IA falham de formas consistentes e previsíveis. Eles fabricam npm packages, alucinam APIs, cometem a mesma refatoração 10 vezes.
